DP.209.0000:
Don’t you dare go into the Valley
Windworks.\f
I got ordered to keep everyone out
if they’re not part of Team Galactic.\f
You’re giving me a look that makes
me think you’re gonna try to get in.\f
OK, then.
You’ll have to battle me for it!\f
DP.209.0001:
Isn’t that just great.
Getting owned by some kid.\f
But you can’t do a thing if I lock
myself in with my Works Key!\f
That’s right, the other Works Key’s
not here!\f
My cohorts in the flower patch
have the only other one!\f
Hahaha! In that sense, I’m no
longer the loser!\f
DP.209.0004:
It’s locked from inside!\f
Use the Works Key?
DP.209.0005:
Ker-chunk!\f
The door to Valley Windworks opened!
